summary: CRITICAL: workflow uses `actions/checkout@v4` (version tag) instead of full SHA pin—violates supply chain security best practice. TypeScript code is excellent with explicit types, proper error handling, and pluggable LicenseLookup interface. Test harness has minor duplication in error checking (~150-158) that could be factored into a helper. Otherwise solid: clear separation of concerns, comprehensive fixture-based testing via act, good comments explaining the approach. Would not ship without fixing action references to SHA.
